Notes: STAMATS DATA APP — Infrastructure & Tooling Cost Summary for 30 Users

What It Does: Hosts the web application and runs the backend API as serverless functions. All user traffic flows through Vercel. Handles SSL certificates, CDN, and deploy previews automatically.
Notes: Only developer seats cost money. The 30 end-users access the app via a URL — they are NOT Vercel seats. We only need 1–3 developer seats for the people who deploy code. Includes 1TB bandwidth, 1000 serverless function hours.

What It Does: Managed PostgreSQL database that stores ALL application data: user accounts, Q&A library, proposals, pipeline data, documents, conversations, audit logs. Also provides cloud file storage for uploaded photos.
Notes: Includes 8 GB database storage, 250 GB bandwidth, 100 GB file storage, 100K monthly active users. More than sufficient for 30 users. Spend cap enabled by default to prevent surprise charges. Overages: $0.125/GB database, $0.021/GB file storage.

What It Does: Powers ALL AI features in the app: answering questions from the library, adapting content (shorten/expand/rewrite), analyzing RFPs, generating document drafts, summarizing proposals, and providing case study insights. This is the intelligence behind the tool.
Notes: No fixed monthly fee — billed per API call. GPT-4o costs $2.50 per 1M input tokens and $10.00 per 1M output tokens. GPT-4o-mini (used for bulk categorization) costs $0.15/$0.60 per 1M tokens. Estimate assumes moderate daily use by 30 people. Light usage could be as low as $30/mo; heavy usage could reach $200/mo.

What It Does: Stores the application source code, tracks all changes, and enables collaboration between developers. Required for Vercel's automatic deployment pipeline (push code → app updates automatically).
Notes: Only developers need paid seats — NOT end-users. For 1–3 developers: $4–$12/mo. Includes 3000 CI/CD minutes, 2 GB package storage, branch protection rules.

What It Does: AI coding assistant used to build and maintain this application. Writes code, debugs issues, deploys updates, and implements new features. Dramatically accelerates development speed.
Notes: This is a developer tool — only the person building/maintaining the app needs it. NOT needed by end-users. Alternative: Team Standard plan at $25/seat/mo if multiple developers need access.
Conservative estimate. OpenAI usage is the main variable cost — will scale with how actively the 30 users interact with AI features.

What It Does: 1. END-USERS COST NOTHING EXTRA — The 30 users simply log into the web app with their @stamats.com email. They do not need accounts on Vercel, GitHub, Supabase, or Claude. Those are infrastructure/dev tools.
2. OPENAI IS THE ONLY VARIABLE COST — All other services are fixed monthly fees. OpenAI charges per-use, so cost scales with how much the team uses AI features.
3. NO PER-SEAT FEES FOR USERS — Unlike most SaaS products, this app has zero per-user licensing. Adding user #31 or #100 costs nothing beyond marginal OpenAI API usage.

4. ALL SERVICES INCLUDE FREE TIERS — If cost is a concern, the app can run on free tiers of Vercel (Hobby), Supabase (Free), and GitHub (Free) for testing/evaluation. AI features require OpenAI spend regardless.
5. DATA SECURITY — All data is stored in Supabase (SOC 2 Type II compliant). Authentication uses bcrypt password hashing. Sessions are signed with HMAC. All traffic is HTTPS encrypted.
